---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What CI maintenance problem would this solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should `gh-flakefinder` do?

## Why this belongs in gh-flakefinder

Explain why this fits a small, read-only GitHub CLI extension.

## Non-goals

List anything this request should not do, such as server components, telemetry, workflow mutation, or automatic reruns.

## Example command

```bash
gh flakefinder scan --repo owner/repo --days 30
```
